message.content:
@startuml
package "STB" as STB

actor PackageVodDetail
actor VodProductManager
actor MBS

STB --> PackageVodDetail : PackageVodDetail
STB --> VodProductManager : VodProductManager
STB --> MBS : MBS

PackageVodDetail --> MBS : get package vod detail infos
MBS --> PackageVodDetail : package vod detail infos

PackageVodDetail --> VodProductManager : getProductButtons(productList)
VodProductManager --> PackageVodDetail : product buttons

opt [getting Push for vod purchased]
PackageVodDetail --> MBS : purchasePush(offerId)
MBS --> PackageVodDetail : discount/cash coupon, membership point
PackageVodDetail --> VodProductManager : get user discount infos
VodProductManager --> PackageVodDetail : discount/cash coupon, membership point

opt [vod product contains offerId]
PackageVodDetail --> MBS : get package vod detail infos
MBS --> PackageVodDetail : package vod detail infos
PackageVodDetail --> VodProductManager : getProductButtons(productList)
VodProductManager --> PackageVodDetail : product buttons

@enduml
